architecture.summary: sw-closer subagent wraps sw:done in fresh context. Follows sw-pm pattern. Only SKILL.md templates and agent definition.

integrations.summary: Integrates with sw:done, sw:grill, sw:judge-llm. Updates team-lead, team-merge, do, auto SKILL.md. Non-cloud fallback.

ui-ux.summary: No UI. CLI-only SKILL.md changes. close-all prints summary table.

performance.summary: Fresh context prevents overflow. Sequential closure for dependency order.

security.summary: sw-closer only fixes closure metadata. specweave complete CLI is only completion path.

edge-cases.summary: Gate 0 desync: sync-acs + retry once. Missing reports: report failure. Non-cloud: direct sw:done fallback.
